final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: interior design editorial photo, lifestyle magazine shot
Primary request: French romantic bedroom scene with canopy bed, vintage vanity, and Paris street view through window
Scene/backdrop: elegant Parisian bedroom with tall windows overlooking classic Paris streetscape, Haussmann architecture visible outside
Subject: four-poster canopy bed with flowing sheer curtains, antique vanity table with ornate mirror, scattered rose petals on bed and floor
Style/medium: editorial interior photography, soft romantic aesthetic
Composition/framing: medium wide shot capturing bed as focal point, window to one side, balanced room layout
Lighting/mood: soft morning light streaming through window, gentle and dreamy atmosphere, warm and lazy mood
Color palette: soft cream and ivory tones, dusty rose accents, warm golden morning light, muted sage greens
Materials/textures: flowing sheer fabric canopy, polished antique wood furniture, crisp linen bedding, delicate rose petals, wrought iron balcony railing visible through window
Constraints: maintain elegant and languid atmosphere, keep Paris street view clearly visible through window
Avoid: harsh shadows, cluttered composition, modern furniture, plastic textures, oversaturated colors
